title: Alphabet ups 2026 capex to as much as $190 billion, expects to 'significantly increase' in 2027
summary_full: Alphabet reported first-quarter earnings, posting booming cloud revenue and upping its full-year capex spend to as much as $190 billion.
summary_public: Alphabet reported first-quarter earnings, posting booming cloud revenue and upping its full-year capex spend to as much as $190 billion.
